examples.pinyin: tā shìtú zǔnáo wǒmen de jìhuà.
examples.english: He tried to obstruct our plan.

definition: to organize; to set up; to form

examples.hanzi: 他们准备组建一个团队。
examples.pinyin: tā men zhǔn bèi zǔ jiàn yī gè tuán duì
examples.english: They are going to form a team.

examples.pinyin: Tā zhèngzài zǔzhuāng diànnǎo.
examples.english: He is assembling a computer.

definition: handed down through generations; inherited from ancestors

examples.hanzi: 他家有一件祖传的玉器。
examples.pinyin: Tā jiā yǒu yī jiàn zǔ chuán de yù qì.
examples.english: His family has a piece of jade that has been passed down through generations.

examples.pinyin: wǒ de zǔ fù hěn cí xiáng
examples.english: My grandfather is very kind.

definition: ancestral home; place of one's family origin

examples.pinyin: Wǒ de zǔjí shì Shāndōng.
examples.english: My ancestral home is Shandong.

examples.pinyin: Wǒ de zǔmǔ hěn cíxiáng.
examples.english: My grandmother is very kind.

examples.hanzi: 我们的祖宗留下了很多智慧。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen de zǔzōng liúxiàle hěnduō zhìhuì.
examples.english: Our ancestors left behind a lot of wisdom.

definition: to exploit a loophole; take advantage of a gap

examples.pinyin: tā zǒng xiǎng zuān kòng zi zhàn pián yi.
examples.english: He always tries to exploit loopholes to gain advantages.

examples.pinyin: Zhè méi zuànshí jièzhi hěn piàoliang.
examples.english: This diamond ring is very beautiful.

definition: to study intensively; to delve into

examples.pinyin: Tā xǐhuān zuānyán lìshǐ.
examples.english: He likes to study history thoroughly.

examples.pinyin: tā de zuǐchún hěn hóng.
examples.english: Her lips are very red.

definition: a person who has committed a crime; criminal

examples.pinyin: Jǐngchá zhuāzhù le zuìfàn.
examples.english: The police caught the criminal.

examples.hanzi: 他是这次事故的罪魁祸首。
examples.pinyin: Tā shì zhè cì shìgù de zuì kuí huò shǒu.
examples.english: He is the chief culprit of this accident.

examples.hanzi: 这位尊贵的客人来自远方。
examples.pinyin: Zhè wèi zūnguì de kèrén láizì yuǎnfāng.
examples.english: This honorable guest comes from afar.

examples.hanzi: 人们应该维护自己的尊严。
examples.pinyin: rén men yīng gāi wéi hù zì jǐ de zūn yán。
examples.english: People should uphold their own dignity.

definition: to follow, to comply with (rules, principles)

examples.hanzi: 我们必须遵循交通规则。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen bìxū zūnxún jiāotōng guīzé.
examples.english: We must follow traffic rules.

examples.pinyin: qǐng zūn zhào zhǐ shì
examples.english: Please follow the instructions.

definition: to ponder; to think over; to deliberate

examples.hanzi: 这个问题需要仔细琢磨。
examples.pinyin: Zhège wèntí xūyào zǐxì zhuómó.
examples.english: This problem needs careful consideration.

definition: to look left and right; to glance around

examples.hanzi: 他左顾右盼，好像在找什么东西。
examples.pinyin: Tā zuǒgùyòupàn, hǎoxiàng zài zhǎo shénme dōngxi.
examples.english: He looked left and right, as if looking for something.

examples.pinyin: Tā kǎoshì zuòbì bèi zhuāzhù le.
examples.english: He was caught cheating on the exam.

examples.pinyin: Tā zǒng gēn wǒ zuò duì.
examples.english: He always opposes me.

definition: to cancel; to invalidate; to become invalid

examples.pinyin: Zhè zhāng zhīpiào yǐjīng zuòfèi le.
examples.english: This check has been invalidated.

definition: style; manner; way of doing things

examples.pinyin: Tā de gōngzuò zuòfēng hěn yánjǐn.
examples.english: His work style is very rigorous.

definition: to be a guest; to visit as a stranger

examples.pinyin: Wǒ míngtiān qù péngyou jiā zuòkè.
examples.english: I'm going to visit my friend's house tomorrow.

examples.pinyin: Nóngmín zhòngzhí zuòwù.
examples.english: Farmers grow crops.

examples.pinyin: Tā zuòxī hěn yǒu guīlǜ.
examples.english: He has a very regular daily routine.

examples.pinyin: shìbīngmen zài zhànchǎng shàng zuòzhàn.
examples.english: The soldiers are fighting on the battlefield.

definition: to be situated (of buildings, mountains, etc.)

examples.pinyin: Zhè zuò sìmiào zuòluò yú shāndǐng.
examples.english: This temple is located on the mountain top.

definition: informal discussion; to have a roundtable discussion

examples.pinyin: Tāmen zhèngzài jìnxíng zuòtán.
examples.english: They are having an informal discussion.

examples.hanzi: 我的座右铭是“永不放弃”。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ de zuò yòu míng shì 'yǒng bù fàng qì'.
examples.english: My motto is 'never give up'.

examples.pinyin: tā yuànyì wèi zhè jiàn shì zuò zhèng.
examples.english: He is willing to testify about this matter.

definition: to make the decision; to be in charge

examples.pinyin: Zhè jiàn shì yóu nǐ lái zuò zhǔ.
examples.english: You are the one to decide on this matter.
